benefits.description: Weight dropped almost too quickly on aggressive diet with Reta

side_effects.description: Appetite suppression was too much at 3mg/week, had to go back down to 2mg
Lost too much weight too quickly on OMAD/carnivore diet, looked scrawny and people asked if ill

protocol_notes: Made multiple mistakes: overpaid for first Reta purchase, got scammed by first gray vendor, bought many peptides with no benefit, started multiple at same time making side effect attribution difficult, went too aggressive on diet (OMAD, almost carnivore), didn't prioritize protein/resistance training, ordered 30mg vials assuming 4mg/week dose but had to reduce from 3mg to 2mg due to excessive suppression.
